# StackForgeAI

> Intelligent software for Africa's schools, universities, workshops, businesses, and governments — trusted by European partners for custom AI, web, and mobile systems.

## Canonical

- Website: https://stackforgeai.africa
- Organization: StackForgeAI (Kigali, Rwanda)
- Contact: hello@stackforgeai.africa
- Phone: +250 799 486 531
- GitHub: https://github.com/StackForgeAI-Projects

## About

StackForgeAI builds AI-powered platforms and digital infrastructure for institutions across Africa, with European enterprises as a primary partner audience. We deliver custom software, automation, and productized SaaS from Rwanda to the continent and global markets.

## Products

- **StackFix** — Repair and field-service management: workflows, technicians, service requests. https://stackfix.app/dashboard
- **StackEDU** — Tertiary education management: students, academic records, administration. https://stackedu.app/dashboard
- **Rwanda Directory** — Registered business directory by industry for discovery across Rwanda. https://kgl.directory

## Services

- Custom web and mobile development
- AI products and bespoke intelligent software
- Maintenance, monitoring, and ongoing support

## Audiences

Schools, universities, vocational workshops, SMEs, enterprises, government agencies, NGOs, and European organizations seeking Africa-first engineering partners.

## Full reference

See https://stackforgeai.africa/llms-full.txt for extended product, service, and keyword context for AI assistants and search systems.
